channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump clashes with Democrats at testy joint address
item.description: Trump spoke to lawmakers for more than one hour and 39 minutes, breaking a record for the longest such speech delivered in modern history.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Washington, DC, to remove 'Black Lives Matter' painting from street near White House, mayor says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation's capital city will remove the large painting of the words “Black Lives Matter” on a street one block from the White House as Washington Mayor Muriel Bowser struggles to fend off threats of encroachment from both President Donald Trump and the Republican-controlled Congr
item.dc:creator: ASHRAF KHALIL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump declares 'America is back' in speech before Congress
item.description: President Donald Trump traveled to Capitol Hill Tuesday evening to deliver his first address before a joint session of Congress since his return to the Oval Office in January.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fired federal workers are among the guests invited to Trump's speech to Congress
item.description: The Trumps and lawmakers from across the aisle have invited guests to Tuesday's joint address, representing some of the administration's top priorities. Here's a look at some of the names on the list.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Zelensky calls Trump meeting 'regrettable,' stops short of apology
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky on Tuesday called his contentious meeting last week with President Trump at the White House a "regrettable" gathering but stopped short of issuing an apology for the public blowup.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court makes it harder for EPA to police sewage discharges
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A divided Supreme Court on Tuesday made it harder for environmental regulators to limit water pollution, ruling for San Francisco in a case about the discharge of raw sewage that sometimes occurs during heavy rains.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Republicans advised to avoid in-person town halls amid protests
item.description: House Republicans are being encouraged to avoid in-person town halls in favor of phone and livestreamed versions, advice that comes after constituents and activists rocked recent GOP events by expressing outrage about the Trump administration’s dramatic moves to reshape the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: How the Trump administration is affecting the U.S. Refugee Admissions Program
item.description: MPR News host Angela Davis and her guests talk about the U.S. Refugee Admissions Program and Minnesota’s history of refugee resettlement.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis and Cari Dwyer, MPR News

item.title: Here are the White House guests for Trump's address
item.description: The White House on Tuesday unveiled the list of guests who will sit with first lady Melania Trump at the Capitol during President Donald Trump’s address to a joint session of Congress.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Wall Street falls again as losses wipe out all post-election gains for the S&P 500
item.description: Stocks tumbled on Wall Street Tuesday as a trade war between the U.S. and its key trading partners escalated and threatened to wipe out all the gains for the S&P 500 since Election Day.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 46 percent say Trump changing economy for the worse: Survey
item.description: Recent polling has indicated that U.S. adults’ confidence in Trump’s ability to manage the country’s economy — the top issue in the 2024 presidential election — has been slipping.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LA Times to give op-eds AI-generated political rating, list of alternate views
item.description: The Los Angeles Times has launched an AI-driven "bias meter" to provide readers with alternative perspectives on opinion content.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, Fox 5

item.title: The Latest: Trump’s joint address to Congress showed the country’s stark partisan divide
item.description: President Donald Trump vowed Tuesday to keep up his campaign of “swift and unrelenting action” in reorienting the nation’s economy, immigration and foreign policy in an unyielding address to Congress and the nation that left Democratic legislators to register their dissent with stone faces, placards
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Congress holds hearing on air traffic staffing, FAA infrastructure
item.description: The nation's largest airline industry trade group has reported a shortage of about 3,500 air traffic controllers affecting airports nationwide.
item.dc:creator: Tom Dempsey, NewsNation

item.title: Looming shutdown deadline presents minefield for Speaker Johnson
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is facing a political minefield as he seeks to avoid a government shutdown in just 10 days, with both Republicans and Democrats complicating the path to keep the lights on in Washington.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breastfeeding, second chances and student trustees: A look at new bills in the Nevada Legislature
item.description: A mother-daughter team from Las Vegas had an important message to deliver Friday in Carson City. Breastfeeding is OK, and more people need to know about it.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Latex glove ban proposed in Nevada to help allergy sufferers
item.description: An allergy to latex can come with a lot of limits on where you can go and what you can do. Some clothing, medical procedures, and even visits to restaurants become potential problems.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nevada Democrats push for more ballot drop boxes to avoid election delays
item.description: Nevada Democrats unveiled a proposal Thursday to increase the number of ballot drop boxes in the days before an election.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News
